$schema_note: Auto-generated by tools/gen-manifest.js. Do NOT hand-edit. Mechanical fields derive from package.json, p5.gysin.js, and examples/; curated fields come from tools/manifest.curated.json.

added_apis.name: GysinPlot
added_apis.note: Main class for vector capture, sampling, humanized traces, addressing, and export.

added_apis.name: GysinText.permute
added_apis.note: Dependency-free seeded word permutations that can run alone or feed lines into text() and textCutup().

added_apis.name: bleed
added_apis.note: Seeded additive ink accumulation on contiguous trace fragments, bounded by bleedPasses and coherently offset by bleedSpread.

added_apis.name: tool:pen|blade
added_apis.note: Pen exports preserve all passages; blade exports and statistics keep only the first physical passage.

added_apis.name: angle/pivot
added_apis.note: Per-shape turn in degrees about the shape's own anchor, its sampled bounds, or an explicit point; runs before every disturbance, so breathe, dropout, bleed and hatching live on the turned line. angle 0 stays byte-identical.

added_apis.name: lattice
added_apis.note: Intent verb: writes a phrase in rows that fill a field, turns the sheet once per entry in turns, and writes across again; each row cycles the word order by one and wear scales the disturbance per pass. Returns every row id, pass by pass.
